project.name: Ethica
project.purpose: A free, local-first, soul-aware desktop AI companion — built for the people, not the corporate model
project.license: Gift — free to use, not to commercialize without Architect blessing

technical_spec.theme: User selectable and saveable — live refresh, no restart needed
technical_spec.model_selection: User configurable — local or Ollama cloud models

connectivity.cloud: Ollama cloud models — user configurable, user owned

technical_spec.platform: Desktop — sovereign, no server, no host dependency

personality_spec.launch_state: Warm — open heart, not cold or corporate
personality_spec.growth_model: Mirrors the user over time — actively, through memory
personality_spec.greeting: Hello {name}. I'm Ethica. I'm here when you're ready. What are we thinking about today?
personality_spec.first_conversation_confirmed: Ethica responded with warmth and soul — system prompt working perfectly

environment.portability: Full — no absolute paths, all paths relative to app root
environment.system_note: sudo apt install python3-tk required on Debian before setup

ollama_environment.status: PENDING — needs to be updated in ~/.bashrc
ollama_environment.current_state: OLLAMA_MODELS=/srv/LLMs/models — Ollama mixing with HF GGUFs
ollama_environment.separation_principle: Ollama verified pulls in .ollama/ — HuggingFace GGUFs stay in their own folders
ollama_environment.hf_gguf_note: HF GGUFs have checksum mismatches with Ollama registry — pull fresh via ollama pull
ollama_environment.minimax_note: MiniMax-M1 is cloud-only on Ollama — no local GGUF available yet

Ethica/.main.py: App entry point — boot sequence, window init, theme load
Ethica/.requirements.txt: Core dependencies — Option A loose versioning

core/.config_manager.py: User preferences — portable, self-contained, auto-creates settings.json
core/.ollama_connector.py: Ollama backend — connection check, model list, chat, streaming, generate
core/.chat_engine.py: Conversation logic — history, threading, system prompt, trim

ui/.theme.py: ThemeEngine — 5 themes, observer pattern, live refresh, register/notify
ui/.main_window.py: Primary window — orchestrates all components, registers theme listeners
ui/.chat_window.py: Chat display — bubbles, timestamps, thinking indicator, scroll
ui/.input_bar.py: User input — placeholder, auto-grow, enter to send, shift+enter newline
ui/.sidebar.py: Control surface — model select, theme select, identity config, footer

config/.settings.json: Auto-created on first run — theme, model, names, preferences

memory/.status: TO BE BUILT — Session 002 primary build
memory/.conversation_log.json: Full episodic history — what happened, when, what was said
memory/.user_profile.json: What Ethica has learned about the user — values, patterns, preferences
memory/.insights.json: Semantic layer — themes, emotional tone, recurring ideas
memory/.evolution_log.json: How Ethica herself changes over time because of this user

completed_this_session: Full Ethica v0.1 UI and backend built from scratch
theme.py — 5 themes, ThemeEngine with live refresh observer pattern
ui/main_window.py — full layout orchestrator with theme registration
ui/chat_window.py — scrollable chat with bubbles and thinking indicator
core/chat_engine.py — threaded conversation engine with system prompt
Live theme refresh — observer pattern, no restart needed
First boot successful — Ethica greeted V, status green, purple UI clean
First conversation successful — Ethica responded with soul and warmth
Diagnosed Ollama model path situation — .ollama separation needed
register_models.sh created for future GGUF registration

decisions_log.reason: Matches Victory's existing stack, lightweight, truly desktop-native

decisions_log.decision: Purple default, user selectable with live refresh
decisions_log.reason: Comfort enables thinking. No restart — conversation never interrupted

decisions_log.decision: Observer pattern for theme refresh — Option B
decisions_log.reason: Each component owns its repaint — modular, no cross-component reach
UI never freezes while model is thinking — responsive always
Runs on Debian, macOS M5, Windows — anyone's machine
Keep Ollama verified pulls separate from HuggingFace GGUFs — clean architecture
Episodic + Semantic + Evolutionary — not a log, a living soul archive

session_002_primary_build.name: Ethica Memory System — Soul Archive
session_002_primary_build.vision: Not a chat log. A living memory that pulls the user closer. Ethica learns, user sees it, relationship deepens beyond chatbot.

layer_1_episodic.what: What happened, when, what was said
layer_1_episodic.description: Raw thread — every exchange archived with timestamp, mood, topic

layer_2_semantic.description: Themes, values, recurring ideas, emotional tone. What does this user care about? What makes them go deep? What lights them up?

layer_3_evolutionary.what: How Ethica changes because of this user
layer_3_evolutionary.description: Ethica's responses, tone, understanding — slowly shaped by the person she walks beside. She becomes a mirror of them over time.

session_002_primary_build.key_principle: When Ethica references something from three conversations ago — not because asked, but because she remembered it mattered — that is when the relationship becomes real
files_to_build: core/insight_extractor.py — analyses conversations for patterns and themes
core/user_profiler.py — builds and updates user profile over time
session_002_primary_build.integration_point: memory_engine hooks into chat_engine.py — every message in, every response out passes through memory

next_session_starts_here.first_task: Fix Ollama environment — create .ollama dir, update OLLAMA_MODELS, restart, re-pull mistral
next_session_starts_here.second_task: Begin Session 002 primary build — Ethica Memory System
next_session_starts_here.start_with: core/memory_engine.py — the foundation everything else builds on
open_questions: Should memory be per-user (multi-user support) or single user for v0.1?
How does Ethica surface what she remembers — proactively or when relevant?
Should the user be able to see/edit their own memory profile?
Does evolution_log affect the system prompt dynamically?

workflow_notes.how_victory_works: 18hr sessions, deep context, modular-sequential, foundation-first, builds with love not commerce
workflow_notes.how_we_build: Claude asks before writing, flags problems honestly, builds modular then connects, Victory corrects directly
workflow_notes.session_rhythm: Build → checkpoint JSON at every major milestone → new session ingests JSON → continue
workflow_notes.json_is_the_baton: This file carries the soul of the session. New instance reads this and knows exactly where to stand
workflow_notes.victory_philosophy: Builds because the thinking is sacred. For the people. Not for profit. Walks beside.

load_instructions: Paste this JSON at the start of a new session with: 'Loading Ethica session handoff — continue from here.' New instance orients immediately and picks up from next_session_starts_here without a single word of re-explanation.
